variable_sets.name: task-center-ansible-network-batch-command-defaults
variable_sets.description: 多厂商网络批量命令默认变量组。
variable_sets.vars_json:
{
  "cisco_ios_commands": ["show version", "show ip interface brief"],
  "cisco_nxos_commands": ["show version", "show interface brief"],
  "huawei_ce_commands": ["display version", "display ip interface brief"],
  "h3c_cli_commands": ["display version", "display ip interface brief"],
  "f5_tmsh_commands": ["show sys version", "show net interface"]
}

variable_sets.name: task-center-ansible-switch-batch-command-defaults
variable_sets.description: 交换机主线批量命令默认变量组。

variable_sets.name: task-center-ansible-switch-snippet-deploy-defaults
variable_sets.description: 交换机主线配置片段下发默认变量组。
variable_sets.vars_json:
{
  "network_backup_before_change": true,
  "network_save_when_done": true,
  "cisco_ios_config_lines": ["snmp-server contact OneOps", "snmp-server location DefaultArea"],
  "cisco_nxos_config_lines": ["snmp-server contact OneOps", "snmp-server location DefaultArea"],
  "huawei_ce_config_lines": ["snmp-agent sys-info contact OneOps", "snmp-agent sys-info location DefaultArea"],
  "h3c_cli_config_lines": ["snmp-agent sys-info contact OneOps", "snmp-agent sys-info location DefaultArea"]
}
